summary: Testing completed for critical DEV-/FAC- prefix bug fix. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI correctly displays and creates documents with proper prefixes. Bug fix verified: creating a devis now returns DEV- prefix instead of FAC-.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: Duplicate /invoices routes in server.py were removed
routes/invoices.py get_next_invoice_number() correctly generates DEV- for devis and FAC- for facture
Frontend InvoicesPage.jsx correctly passes document_type to API

success_rate.frontend: 100% (DEV-/FAC- prefixes display correctly, creation flow works)

seed_data_creation: Created test invoices/devis during testing (DEV-2026-0007, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical DEV-/FAC- prefix bug has been fixed and verified. The fix involved removing duplicate /invoices routes from server.py that were overriding the correct routes in routes/invoices.py. All invoice/devis CRUD operations work correctly.

create_devis_dev_prefix.details: POST /api/invoices with document_type='devis' returns DEV- prefix (e.g., DEV-2026-0007)

create_facture_fac_prefix.details: POST /api/invoices with document_type='facture' returns FAC- prefix

get_invoices_list.details: GET /api/invoices returns list with both DEV- and FAC- prefixed documents

get_single_invoice.details: GET /api/invoices/{id} returns correct document with proper prefix

get_invoice_pdf.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns PDF with correct filename (devis_DEV-*.pdf)

get_invoice_pdf_url.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf-url returns Cloudinary URL with correct filename

frontend_display.details: Facturation page displays both DEV- and FAC- prefixed documents correctly

frontend_create_devis.details: Creating a devis via UI generates DEV- prefix and shows success message

mocked_features.note: All APIs are real implementations. Brevo email configured with noreply@alphagency.fr (requires verification in Brevo dashboard)
